context.usage: Provides the visible baseline and landing reference for the 600x150 play frame.

shape.silhouette: Straight 1200 px horizontal strip with constant 2 px thickness for seamless tiling.

acceptance_criteria: Left and right edges tile seamlessly when repeated at 1200 px intervals.

reference_images.label: environment_reference
reference_images.purpose: Ground texture density, cloud spacing, and skyline emptiness anchor.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Pixel-art outline, low-detail silhouette, and monochrome contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for background and scrolling ground strips with integer-position parallax.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_ground_line_1200x2.png through AssetServer and register the handle under world_ground_line_1200x2.
runtime_notes: Keep source pixels unfiltered with nearest-neighbor sampling and integer world transforms.
Spawn order follows execution_order so downstream setup can validate deterministic asset availability.
Collision and UI code read logical dimensions from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata.
